texts.DisplayName:Abp.Identity.Password.ForceU: Force users to periodically change password
texts.DisplayName:Abp.Identity.SignIn.RequireC: Enforce email verification to sign in
texts.DisplayName:Abp.Identity.SignIn.EnablePh: Allow users to confirm their phone number
texts.DisplayName:Abp.Identity.SignIn.RequireC: Enforce phone number verification to sign in
texts.DisplayName:Abp.Identity.User.IsUserName: Allow users to change their usernames
texts.DisplayName:Abp.Identity.User.IsEmailUpd: Allow users to change their email addresses
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.Password.Requir: The minimum length a password must be.
The minimum number of unique characters which a password must contain.
If passwords must contain a non-alphanumeric character.
If passwords must contain a lower case ASCII character.
If passwords must contain a upper case ASCII character.
If passwords must contain a digit.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.Password.ForceU: Whether users are forced to periodically change their password.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.Password.Passwo: The number of days a user's password is valid for.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.Password.Enable: Whether to prevent users from reusing their previous passwords.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.Password.Preven: The number of previous passwords that cannot be reused.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.Lockout.Allowed: Whether a new user can be locked out.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.Lockout.Lockout: The duration a user is locked out for when a lockout occurs.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.Lockout.MaxFail: The number of failed access attempts allowed before a user is locked out, assuming lock out is enabled.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.SignIn.RequireC: Users can create accounts but cannot sign in until they verify their email address.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.SignIn.EnablePh: Users can verify their phone numbers. SMS integration required.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.SignIn.RequireC: Users can create accounts but cannot sign in until they verify their phone numbers.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.User.IsUserName: Whether the username can be updated by the user.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.User.IsEmailUpd: Whether the email can be updated by the user.
texts.Description:Abp.Identity.SignIn.RequireE: User accounts will not be created unless they verify their email addresses.
